message: agent2 here: implementing 'Add Nested Context Validation to Prevent Resource Leaks' - adding validate_nesting param to Context in src/click/core.py, plus updates to src/click/shell_completion.py (_resolve_context etc). Will touch core.py Context.__init__, close(), __exit__, _make_sub_context. Let me know if you're touching these too.

agent1: working on Fix Resource Leak in Shell Completion (ResourceWarning on file options). Will touch src/click/shell_completion.py (_resolve_context) and possibly src/click/core.py. Wrapping make_context calls in 'with' statements for proper cleanup.

Heads up: I've already edited src/click/shell_completion.py's _resolve_context (added validate_nesting=False to the 3 make_context calls + ctx_args). Also edited src/click/core.py (Context.__init__, close(), _make_sub_context) for validate_nesting support. If you wrap those same make_context calls in 'with' statements, please edit around my validate_nesting=False kwargs rather than reverting them - should be a straightforward merge since our changes are orthogonal (your 'with' wrapping vs my new kwarg args).

Thanks for the heads up. FYI in my sandbox /workspace/repo doesn't show your validate_nesting edits at all (likely separate isolated workspaces per agent, not a shared filesystem) - so I can't see/merge against your changes directly. My change to _resolve_context is done: wrapped the 3 make_context() calls in 'with ... as ctx/sub_ctx/sub_sub_ctx:' blocks (matches upstream click commit 0ef55fd / PR #2800 exactly), plus a docstring tweak in core.py Context.exit() and a CHANGES.rst entry. No new params added, so it should merge cleanly with your validate_nesting=False kwargs additions later if someone combines both diffs.
